seedanceSegments.title: Neige parmesan et suer
seedanceSegments.description: Râpé fin, échalotes prêtes, beurre mousse, suer, torréfaction riz sec.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Opening stays texture-first; scene 2 in logical board pays off aromatics after cold cheese powder.
seedanceSegments.risk: Avoid anonymous powder that could read as flour; keep parmesan warm yellow-white.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: fine grate; butter foam sizzle; rice clatter; spatula scrape

seedanceSegments.title: Risotto et confetti verts
seedanceSegments.description: Déglace vin, louches, crème du riz, transfert, pois persil parmesan.

references.role: target folded risotto with peas parmesan parsley
references.name: CoolRisottoPeaParmesanFold
references.label: CoolRisottoPeaParmesanFold

seedanceSegments.continuity: Thermomix choreography from cookbook is replaced by visible casserole physics.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may puree peas; insist on whole peas popping in cream.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: hiss steam; broth pour; spatula fold; herb sprinkle

seedanceSegments.title: Refroidir et fermer mozzarella
seedanceSegments.description: Temps malléable, sphères 6 cm, puits cube mozzarella, fermeture.
seedanceSegments.continuity: State references avoid invented sphere topology.
seedanceSegments.risk: Risk of cube visible through wall; keep plug interior hidden until fry segment.

seedanceSegments.title: Double panure mate
seedanceSegments.continuity: Hard cut between pale states rather than continuous morph.
seedanceSegments.risk: Crumb may read as sand; specify fine uniform grain.

seedanceSegments.title: Bain 180 et dorure
seedanceSegments.description: Huile chaude, plongeon, halo bulle, rotation dorée, sortie égout.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Uses explicit pale-to-fried state cut to protect fragile browning read.
seedanceSegments.risk: Avoid under-oil framing that hides bubble physics.

seedanceSegments.title: Blot pull fil cheese
seedanceSegments.description: Score coque, ouverture vapeur, stretch mozzarella, intérieur grains, bol rustique.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Cheese physics require split reference rather than imagining stretch.
seedanceSegments.risk: Model may liquefy mozzarella; reinforce elastic threads staying opaque white.

seedanceSegments.title: Fin accompagnée et chef
seedanceSegments.description: Petite assiette, salade option, personnage satisfait macro final.
seedanceSegments.continuity: Closes Licorn cockpit rule character visible gratified beside finished pile.
seedanceSegments.risk: Avoid second context shot back-to-back if greens feel redundant; can compress.
